headline: A Look At CSX (CSX) Valuation As Signals On Undervaluation And DCF Clash
summary: CSX stock moves and recent performance snapshot CSX (CSX) has recently traded around $38.87, showing a 0.2% decline over the past day, a 3.6% decline over the past week, and an 8.1% decline over the month, compared with a 5.7% gain over the past three months. See our latest analysis for CSX. Despite recent weakness in the 1 month share price return, CSX still shows a 7.2% year to date share price gain and a 33.6% 1 year total shareholder return, suggesting earlier momentum has cooled while...

headline: Transload provider bringing new life to dormant Maine rail lines
summary: In Maine, a rail services company is making plans to restart freight services on dormant lines. The post Transload provider bringing new life to dormant Maine rail lines appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Evercore ISI Downgrades CSX Corporation (CSX) to In Line from Outperform
summary: CSX Corporation (NASDAQ:CSX) is one of the 10 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Now. On March 19, 2026, Evercore ISI downgraded CSX Corporation (NASDAQ:CSX) to In Line from Outperform and raised its price target to $41 from $40. Evercore said that while the company could still deliver industry-leading EPS growth over the next […]

headline: 3 Industrials Stocks We Think Twice About
summary: Whether you see them or not, industrials businesses play a crucial part in our daily activities. They are also bound to benefit from a friendlier regulatory environment with the Trump administration, and this excitement has led to a six-month gain of 7.7% for the sector. Investing here would have been wise - at the same time, the S&P 500 was flat.
